subject: WM-0163 review: verified
body: Re-review verified 4155e1499daa: phases 4/5 drive a bounded serializable JobCoreStore/ReservationLedger lifecycle with synchronized resident state, observational checkpoints permit legal active work, terminal checkpoints fail closed and the 100000-tick run proves non-zero job/reservation peaks plus terminal/acquire/release and zero terminal leaks; canonical world/read hashes now include all five need lanes and resident activity/reason, resource, location, job/reservation and other PR-1 owner/projection facts with equal-version collision tests; the unconditional fixed-tick path no longer calls allocation-bearing createMetrics or NeedStore.processScheduledUpdates APIs and retains owner-store authority. Focused 8 files/66 tests, 18000 and 100000 CLI, typecheck, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and full quality 75 files/425 tests all passed.
